sections.title: Before the player has stolen the Right boot in The Giant Dwarf quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't know dwarves kept cats.

lines.speaker: Dromund's cat
lines.text: Friend of mine lives at the palace, actually. Well, I say friend. Used to be a friend.

lines.speaker: Dromund's cat
lines.text: He got adopted by Hreidmar. The director of the Red Axe.

lines.speaker: Dromund's cat
lines.text: I don't like the Red Axe! They stomp around everywhere, got to be careful of your tail with those people around.

sections.title: When the player tries to simply grab the Right boot in The Giant Dwarf quest

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Get your hands off that, you dirty human!

lines.speaker: Dromund
lines.text: Stay away from there! Who do you think you are, coming into my house like that?

sections.title: After the player has given the exquisite boots to Riki

lines.speaker: Dromund's cat
lines.text: I know what you did, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Dromund's cat
lines.text: You stole a boot from my master.
